hidden_defect.condition: build_upbit_operational_paper_cycle used default 64/64 PAPER/SHADOW evidence counts for a single operational cycle
hidden_defect.impact: dashboard and optimizer maturity surfaces could imply scorecard input readiness or ranking eligibility without real long-run scoped PAPER/SHADOW samples
hidden_defect.reproducibility: reproduced by inspecting the operational cycle report builder and tests that previously expected SCORECARD_INPUT_READY from one generated cycle
hidden_defect.fix: derive paper_sample_count from actual paper dry-run events/reasons, keep shadow_sample_count at 0 without a shadow artifact, and require BLOCK_RANKING until evidence maturity is real
hidden_defect.live_safety_impact: prevents false promotion pressure while all live flags remain false
hidden_defect.ux_impact: dashboard now tells the operator evidence is collecting instead of implying readiness
hidden_defect.profitability_impact: prevents optimizer/convergence ranking from learning from fabricated sample maturity
